content:
INTELLIGENCE BRIEFING — Tue, 17 Feb 2026 01:00:32 GMT
Overall Threat Level: CRITICAL
Total Events: 256 | Critical: 74 | High: 25 | Medium: 19 | Low: 138

CRITICAL ALERTS:
  [MIDDLE EAST] Iran and US flex military might ahead of nuclear talks in Geneva (GDELT)
  [NUCLEAR] Range Nuclear Renaissance Index ETF ( NYSEARCA : NUKZ ) Short Interest Up 26 . 1 % in January (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] Iran meets UN nuclear watchdog in Geneva ahead of a second round of US talks (GDELT)
  [NUCLEAR] US nuclear umbrella will no longer shelter Australia from rising threat of war (GDELT)
  [UKRAINE] North Korea opens new housing district for families of Ukraine war dead - Las Vegas Sun News (GDELT)

REGIONAL ASSESSMENT:
  Middle East (53 events, 20 critical, 5 high):
    - Iran and US flex military might ahead of nuclear talks in Geneva
    - One year on, No Other Land co-director says Israeli attacks intensifying
    - Is the UN headed for financial collapse without US support?
  Ukraine/Russia (23 events, 6 critical, 2 high):
    - Iran meets UN nuclear watchdog in Geneva ahead of a second round of US talks
    - North Korea opens new housing district for families of Ukraine war dead - Las Vegas Sun News

  Europe (35 events, 16 critical, 3 high):
    - Austrian man faces terror charges over Taylor Swift concert attack plot
    - 'We will discriminate': Elon Musk-backed Restore Britain party launches with hard-right vision
    - Sudan war: Sanctions and donor pledges do not fix the catastrophe on the ground
  Indo-Pacific (37 events, 4 critical, 3 high):
    - North Korea Kim unveils new housing district for troops killed fighting for Russia
    - North Korea draws new red line, vows attack over future airspace ‘violations’
    - Gilded Capability: Overinvestment and the Survivability Paradox
  United States (6 events, 1 critical, 2 high):
    - Inside the Strike: The US Munition That Hit a Residential Building in Venezuela
    - US boards second oil tanker in Indian Ocean after it fled Venezuelan raid
    - Pentagon to deploy roughly 200 troops to Nigeria
  Global (79 events, 13 critical, 9 high):
    - Saudi Arabia buys C-27 cargo planes fitted for armed maritime patrols
    - Kenya strike delays flights at international hub airport
    - Bondi Beach shooting accused faces court for the first time

Sources: GDELT, Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye, NYT World, Defense News, BBC Europe, BBC Africa, BBC World, NK News, BBC Middle East, The Guardian, Breaking Defense, CISA Advisories, War on the Rocks, Bellingcat, BBC Latin America, The Diplomat, BBC Asia
